feed.title: eitam ring - systems notes
feed.subtitle: Go, GPUs, and pipelines that don't allocate

entry.title: Ten weekends of CUDA in Go: 30 functions became 106
entry.summary: A progress update on gocudrv, a cgo-free CUDA driver API binding for Go: the thread-pinned executor, embedded PTX, and why the CPU timer was off by 18x.

entry.title: ClassMesh v1: classifying a million log lines for the price of electricity
entry.summary: A confidence-gated classification cascade in Go. Deterministic rules first, models next, expensive calls only for what's left. Zero allocations on the hot path.
